journal_entry.description: Advanced short-term loan to business partner
journal_entry.rationale: Loan Receivable (asset) increases as Target advances $2,000,000 to the business partner; Cash/Chequing account (asset) decreases as funds are transferred out. The interest will be recognized monthly as it is earned.

output_debit_classifier.reason: This entry records the initial loan advance. Target exchanges one asset (cash) for another asset (loan receivable). Interest revenue will be recognized separately at the end of each month using accrual accounting as it is earned.

output_credit_classifier.reason: This entry records the initial loan advance. Target exchanges one asset (cash) for another asset (loan receivable). Interest revenue will be recognized separately at the end of each month using accrual accounting as it is earned.
